title: Risk Analyst
description: PwC is seeking a Risk Analyst to support consulting engagements focused on risk management and compliance. You'll assess enterprise risks, develop mitigation strategies, and support client decision-making. Work remotely for a global professional services firm.
responsibilities: Assess enterprise risk landscapes and identify vulnerabilities
Develop risk mitigation and remediation strategies
Prepare risk assessment reports and presentations
Support client engagements with risk expertise

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Risk Management, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
